title: The Journal of Albion Moonlight
author: Kenneth Patchen
content: “If I were you I would not go there, for there is nothing there but the truth.”

title: Roadside Picnic
author: Arkady and Boris Strugatsky
content: “Happiness for everybody, free, and let no one be left behind!”

title: The Sirens of Titan
author: Kurt Vonnegut
content: “A purpose of human life, no matter who is controlling it, is to love whoever is around to be loved.”

title: Zen and the Art of Motorcycle Maintenance
author: Robert Pirsig
content: “The place to improve the world is first in one's own heart and head and hands, and then work outward from there.”

title: The Wapshot Chronicle
author: John Cheever
content: “Either you have a life or you have a reputation.”
